summary: Full end-to-end backend testing of AI Startup Advisor 5-step flow + voice chat + session persistence. All 9 pytest tests passed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Validated schemas, score ranges (0-100), array lengths, year ordering, risk radar axes, cost_categories pct~100, funding setup labels (Home/Registered/Employees), and absence of MongoDB _id in any response. LLM (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent Universal LLM key) responded with valid JSON for all four LLM endpoints; total runtime ~128s.

minor.issue: Spec says things_to_keep_in_mind must be exactly 5 items; this is enforced only via the prompt. If the LLM returns 4 or 6 items the test will fail. Consider server-side normalization (truncate/pad) or relaxing the strict-5 requirement.
Spec asks for ~8 resources but no server-side enforcement; LLM variance could yield 6 or 10. Test accepts 6-12 to avoid flakiness.
cost_categories pct sum is only requested via prompt, not validated/normalized server-side. Could drift outside 90-110 range under model variance.
growth_projection year ordering depends entirely on the model. Server should sort by year before returning.

action_items: Optional: add server-side post-processing to enforce schema constraints (length of things_to_keep_in_mind=5, resources=8, cost_categories pct sum=100, sorted growth_projection) so the API contract is robust to LLM variance.
Optional: voice-chat reply could be stored in DB for debugging/history; currently only returns reply without persisting.
critical_code_review_comments: _extract_json fallback parser (progressive trim) is O(n^2) on response length; fine for current sizes but watch if responses grow.
Sessions are upserted via $set + $setOnInsert which handles re-runs correctly.
All find_one calls use projection {"_id": 0} - MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded everywhere.
voice-chat uses raw `reply` string from LLM; if LLM ever returns markdown the prompt asks it not to, but no sanitization fallback.
@app.on_event("shutdown") is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
CORS uses allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' which is technically invalid per CORS spec but FastAPI permits it; tighten in production.
test_credentials: none required; EMERGENT_LLM_KEY already set in /app/backend/.env
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates one new session via /api/analyze-idea (random uuid). No cleanup performed; sessions are small documents in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. test_advisor_flow.py is the regression suite - run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_advisor_flow.py -v`. Each LLM call takes 10-25s so total runtime is ~2 minutes. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. If frontend testing is requested, connect UI calls to these same endpoints; voice-chat returns plain string `reply` not structured JSON.
